question_text: A mobile phone charger has a power rating of 5 watts. How much energy does it transfer in 3600 seconds? (Use the formula P = E/t)
explanation: Using P = E/t, we can rearrange to find E = P × t. Substituting the values: E = 5 W × 3600 s = 18,000 joules. This is a straightforward rearrangement of the power formula where energy equals power multiplied by time.
